reviews.author: Christophe
reviews.body: Nice little port. The wharf has been redone. There is no longer any overflowing rock. The outer dike is under construction to lengthen it and further protect the port. The mooring area is therefore much smaller. Watch out for the northerly gale which raises a strong swell in the anchorage. The swell rounded the cape.

reviews.author: Veleroencroacia.com
reviews.body: Very small and fishing position. It has a new dock but only 8 sailboats enter from the west side, the east side only small fishing boats. Good shelter from almost all winds.

reviews.author: Michel
reviews.body: Very nice little port with nice tavernas

reviews.author: Shirley
reviews.body: Full of seagrass! Took us awhile to find a good spot (we hope). Anchored at 20m depth and let out 80m chain. Gusting at 18 to 20kn.

reviews.author: Christian
reviews.body: Mouillage très agréable, par 5 mètres dans le sable, mais il faut arriver tôt car très prisé. Le bar restaurant de la plage est correct, petit ponton d’accueil facile d’accès par 1 mètre de fond, bonne cuisine, prix correct. Nous a commandé un taxi pour visite , 100€ AR 👍

reviews.author: Rolf 0815
reviews.body:
Dieses Jahr 2 mal hier geankert. Vor 10 Jahren ebenso. Ankergrund hat gute Sandstellen auf ca. 4 Metern relativ nahe dem Ufer. 
Die alte Kette unweit dem Restaurant Psarotaverna Aeginitissa liegt immer noch. Vorsicht.
Auch die Nacht von Donnerstag auf Freitag  (Charterheimkehrer) wurde es nicht zu eng. Lag wohl am geringen Nachtwind so dass viele offener Buchten als Alternative zur Verfügung standen.

reviews.author: Alicia Y Pedro 🇦🇷 🇪🇸 @Conocer_Navegando
reviews.body: Fondeamos para almotzar es muy protegido

reviews.author: Eduardo
reviews.body:
We really liked it here. If it wasn’t for thw wind shift we would have stayed longer. We might come back. The anchorage is spacious but we noticed that some boaters (particularly charter boats) have some difficulty to anchor here.
We anchor in a nice sand patch in 4-5 mts and we had 25 mts out. 
The water is clear, good for making water.
Good swimming, SUP and snorkel.
The Aeginitissa restaurant has very good food. Depending on the day, one should make reservations.
There are some garbage bins by the road.
The beach was close but surprisingly not really noisy.

reviews.author: Bogdan
reviews.body: Work in progress for the new pier. Line between 2 floating cranes, without visibility at night.

reviews.author: Bogdan
reviews.body: Work in progress for the new pier. Line between 2 floating cranes, without visibility at night.

reviews.author: Joe
reviews.body: Great anchor hold.  We stopped here for an amazing brunch and cocktails on the way to Berkis cave.  A very high end restaurant worth a stopover for the day or overnight.  Highly enjoyable

reviews.author: Fredrik
reviews.body: Dropped anchor on the west side of the bay.  6-7 meters of water. Sand and some occasional rocks. Water sports from the beach active until 7 pm then quiet and no other boats to be seen. Fancy beach bar open until 7 pm. The owner, George, was a cool guy. Perfect location if you want to avoid mooring in Spetses harbor. 10 minutes walk to town.

reviews.author: André
reviews.body:
Bel emplacement à 10 ou 15 minutes à pied de la ville. La ballade traverse un quartier chic et agréable. ..
Mouillage sans problème (pas d'autre bateau) par 10 mètres de fond, à 250 mètres de la plage.
Pas de jet ski aujourd'hui, ni de musique bruyante. 
Un vrai paradis ...
NB cette plage s'appelle en réalité " agia Marina"

reviews.author: Chedly
reviews.body: Zone de sports nautiques on s'est fait aimablement dégager à partir de 11h.

reviews.author: Sid
reviews.body: Look out, a lot of rocks in front of the swimming buoys

reviews.author: Tiago
reviews.body:
A beautiful big bay with enough places for many boats and a seabed of sand and patches of seaweed. We came to find shelter from a 30kts N-NW wind and waves, dropped our anchor between the caves and the Apollo Hotel in 8m of fine sand and very good holding. During the afternoon some gusts came in but nothing strongly as outside. At night the swell is more noticeable and sometimes uncomfortable but never unsafe.
Many boats had stopped during the day but very few stayed overnight.
We found fresh water on the pontoon, mini-market, bakery and many charming restaurants in the city. The water in the bay is crystal clear and snorkeling is good. The Aphaia Temple is worth a visit.
We ended up staying four days because of the strong winds and waves in the sea. Maybe not the most comfortable spot but very convenient.

www.sailtroublemaker.com

reviews.author: Dom Fuas
reviews.body:
Good for swim and shelter but lot of roling.
Good holding on 8 m deph, easy Access by dinguy to city

reviews.author: Robert
reviews.body: Anchoring-wise good: good depths and holding. Wind-wise alright, some gusts of meltemi do pass and come to the bay. Swell was rather aweful as has been mentioned in other comments. Still bareable. Ag. Marina has not too much to offer except for the Afaia Temple.

reviews.author: Mathilde
reviews.body: Effectivement très roulant quelque soit l'orientation du vent. Cadre très sympa dans cette partie de la baie. L'ancrage est bon, 2 à 8 mètres en fond sableux côté grotte. Possibilité d'aller visiter le beau site archéologique à 30 minutes à pied. Le jour où nous y étions (dimanche soir) beaucoup de bateaux étaient au mouillage dans la journée mais nous étions seulement 4 à y dormir.

reviews.author: Denys 🇺🇦 Diver Services🤿
reviews.body: Тут постоянный свэлл. Якорь держит хорошо. Вода чистая для купания. Но оставаться на долго не комфортно. Есть возможность пришвартоваться кормой к камням. В лагуне с пещерами.  Дно песчаное с островками травы.

reviews.author: Laurent
reviews.body: Very rolling and very uncomfortable mooring whatever the wind. Many taverns. Supermarket. Handy for returning to Athens the next day but that's it.

reviews.author: Michel
reviews.body: Mooring by 3/4 m on sand bottom of good performance. Well sheltered from the North wind but the swell goes around the tip and makes the anchorage very rolling and therefore uncomfortable.

reviews.author: Michel
reviews.body: Mooring by 3/4 m on sand bottom of good performance. Well sheltered from the North wind but the swell goes around the tip and makes the anchorage very rolling and therefore uncomfortable.

reviews.author: Gabriella
reviews.body:
2022 - La marina è piccola, ma 20 barche ci stanno. Sul nuovo pontile si ormeggia solo all’inglese (longside). Niente elettricità, solo acqua. Ottimo aiuto all’ormeggio. Per un catamarano 42ft abbiamo pagato € 27,50 a notte. 
Nelle immediate vicinanze, c’è ristorante, market, bar e piccolo negozio di souvenir.

03/09/2024
Per una barca di 14 metri, ho pagato 25€ a notte, acqua inclusa. Ormeggio con ancora e cime sul molo.

reviews.author: Marina
reviews.body: We stopped just to fuel and have lunch but almost stayed for the night because of how nice it is! The welcome at the port was super friendly, the restaurant next to port was great, supermarket and atm next to it and the diesel truck was the nicest guy with his kid! Highly recommend this place and the diesel delivery!

reviews.author: Sarah
reviews.body:
Here is great, Spiros is super efficient and very welcoming.  Good that he was there to advise re the chain for the pontoon so we could avoid getting anchor snagged! 
I highly recommend Poros

reviews.author: Dave
reviews.body:
I agree with previous comment, Spiros is more than helpful and this is the second time we’ve been here in two years and he remembered us. We tied up on the pontoon and he was on hand. Water is available, 15€ per night for a 12m yacht. 
The main town is a short walk away and there are plenty of restaurants to choose from.

reviews.author: Christian
reviews.body:
Accueillis avec efficacité par Spyros sur canal 12 ou 72, installés sur le ponton flottant, supermarché bien achalandé, possibilité d’avoir de l’eau. Poros est une escale bien protégée, tranquille, dans la verdure, rythmée par les navettes du ferry. 20€ la nuit, Nous sommes arrivés en début d’après-midi, restés 2 nuits, après 17:00 les places deviennent rares mais Spyros trouve la solution.

Retour à Poros fin août pour un stop de 3 nuits. Lors de notre premier passage, nous avions zappé le village. Belles plages sur le trajet et surtout une boucherie, épicerie fine qui peut mettre vos morceaux de choix sous vide. Les prix au village sont plus corrects qu’au supermarché du port. Il faut marcher un petit quart d’heure.

reviews.author: Beppe
reviews.body:
Bel posto..accoglienza ottima da Spyros che ci ha riservato un posto con ormeggio all'inglese molto comodo. Paesino carino e tutto a portata di mano..acqua disponibile senza problemi o costi ...diesel disponibile,  supermercato, spiagge...
No elettricità

reviews.author: Rik
reviews.body: The Marina is as described by other boats but I want to remind people to walk 8 minutes to the main town which is really lovely. The shops at the Marina are not much but there is much more to see just a few minutes away.

reviews.author: Felix
reviews.body: VHF not active at the moment, Spiros to be called on his cellphone +30 698 2947289. Safe port for a night, however right next to a very busy road, frequent traffic by large ferries. Constant smell of sewage. Restaurant in the proximity are at best mediocre. Water and Diesel available, no electricity. Best is to come late and leave early. Staff (especially Spiros) are exceptional.

reviews.author: Xavier
reviews.body:
Étape utile pour se protéger du vent N ,
Et faire le plein d eau.
Accueil chaleureux et efficace à 13h30 après avoir téléphoné au n o sur ce site.
Prix encore raisonable en forte augmentation pour un 11m.
25euro.
Le tam tam parle de 30 euro plus tard cette année. 
Le port était plein le soir et des bateaux ont été refusés. 
Le café à droite de la baie avec sa terrasse à l arrière est étonnant. 
Brit de véhicules lors du départ et arrivée des ferries.
5x par jour.

reviews.author: Sailing
reviews.body:
The hospitality I experienced in Greece was unparalleled. The staff, especially the girls selling water and electricity cards, were incredibly friendly. 

The owner of the Oasis Taverna Restaurant (Kythnos) goes above and beyond, personally assisting with ropes and docking maneuvers. His restaurant is excellent—be sure to book a table as soon as you arrive in Poros.

+48 6944061268

For laundry services, I highly recommend Mary’s Laundry; they offer boat pickup at the best prices (6938 571491 / 22980 26127). 

If you need diesel, you can contact +30 694 4751825.

the street in front of the restaurants and bars closes to cars from 7:30 pm to 6:30 am, so it's great for sleeping.

reviews.author: Bernd
reviews.body: Netter Ort und kompetenter Hafenmeister!

reviews.author: Marcel
reviews.body: Kraftstoff muss angefragt werden, kommt per LKW.

reviews.author: Tomas
reviews.body: Muy buen servicio en locales y combustible

reviews.author: John
reviews.body:
By NW waves creates dangerous shaking inside the port. Too much hot. Too expensive of what it offers. I do not recomend but only in need
The only good here is Spyros.  The harbour master.

reviews.author: Blandine
reviews.body: Nous avons été accueilli par VHF uniquement par Spyros. Il nous a guidé vers une place le long de la toute petite jetée avec à gauche les petits bateaux de location et à droite une place le long pour nous. L’ancre n’a pas eu besoin de faire son oeuvre. Pas de besoin d’eau ou d’électricité donc sans souci pour nous. Des toilettes uniquement. La proximité du ferry et le passage des véhicules qui vont embarquer ne nous a pas dérangé. Il convient juste de faire très attention à la vitesse des véhicules. Ambiance grecque avec des touristes grecques. Belle ballade le long de la plage. Villageois très accueillants. Plein de commerce derrière la plage.

reviews.author: Nicholas
reviews.body: Great little spot. If they provided power it would be a small gem!

reviews.author: Tiziana
reviews.body: Posto accogliente, grande Spiros lo trovavi ovunque pronto a darti una mano!! 20€ a notte market vicino. Il paesino vicino a 10min

reviews.author: francesco
reviews.body:
Porto cittadino molto disturbato dai traghetti e dal traffico di camion che aspettano l'imbarco, ma se avete bisogno di fare acqua e spesa va benissimo. Supermercato fornito di fronte alla banchina. Spiros accoglie tutti molto bene e guida all'ormeggio. Spiaggia molto carina con acqua cristallina fuori dal porto in direzione nord.
In banchina acqua e servizi igienici (no docce)

reviews.author: Thomas
reviews.body:
Tres bien accueilli à l’arrivée, avec des indications sur la manœuvre et sur les équipements du port! Il y a des tavernes, commerces et plages à proximité!

Seul défaut, les déchargements de ferry avec 4/5 fois par jour un trafic important sur le port avec camions et voitures. Mais il suffit de quitter le bateau et aller se promener à ce moment là!

reviews.author: Nicola
reviews.body: Come sempre Spiros fantastico ti indica dove andare e ti aiuta nell’ ormeggio la location ha sempre il suo fascino

reviews.author: Matt
reviews.body:
Very busy at 6pm, failed rafting against another monohull. 

Then experienced DRUNK local man ‘helping’ with lines, do not listen to him, shouting to go into shallow water, when collecting our lines, he moodily gave up and threw the lines back twice. Easterly’s and westerly’s will make it difficult to go stern to, lots of ferry’s with wake going throughout the night. No lazy lines. 12€ for a night with electricity and water, 46” monohull. 

Get here early to avoid difficult mooring.

reviews.author: Matthias und Stefanie
reviews.body:
Anfang April für 4 Nächte längsseits. Sicher gelegen bei nördlichen Winden. Dieser Abschnitt ist bei CharterFlotillen beliebt (auch längsseits 3er Pack) die hier ihren letzten und ersten Tag lautstark feiern( Freitag/ Sonntag - Samstag Athen), Samstag laute Discomusik bis 6am. Wenn man es ruhiger mag und Winde es zulassen besser nördlicher oder südlicher am Stadtkai.
Wenn man hier liegt, ist es schon Usus ins Oasis zu Mike zu gehen - wer die moderne griechische Küche bevorzugt, ist im Giamas oder Apagio gut beraten. 
Der PorosTrail oberhalb ist zu empfehlen.

reviews.author: Lewis
reviews.body:
I spent 5 nights alongside during December. Easy to come alongside with help from fellow sailors, however the bollards are quite far apart and difficult to use if singlehanded. Easy access to two supermarkets on the island however they have limited pre-packaged meats so i took the dingy to the larger AB in galatas. The ferries go 7.4 knots in the channel at this time of year which came cause a bit of roll, luckily i had 8 fenders, two ball fender and two spring lines. A great place in a strong northerly, it was 30 knots in the bay and only saw 5-10 alongside, luckily the chop doesn’t make it to the dock.
There are great mountain bike trails on the island, details on trailforks and the lighthouse trail is great.

reviews.author: Bleri & Steve
reviews.body: Fantastic quayside services even though could use more power and water towers further south.  Nice chandlers in town - Vikos, Pavlou.  Lots of traffic so be aware.

reviews.author: Michel
reviews.body: Amarrer le long du quai face au restaurant l’Oasis nous avons passé une très belle soirée sans trop de bruit malgré la proximité de la rue.

reviews.author: Yves
reviews.body: Small port very nice'attention free water or with the map is brackish.commander spring water cistern

reviews.author: Yves
reviews.body: Small port very nice'attention free water or with the map is brackish.commander spring water cistern

reviews.author: MM
reviews.body: We were here last year too and the private marina was only 10% open then. It seems that they have taken most of the business so there was good amount of room on the public quay. 3 stars due to the vicinity of shops and convenience of laundrette but other than that.. pretty basic.

reviews.author: Michel
reviews.body:
Rien à ajouter aux commentaires précédents  Porto Heli est bien connu. 
Une précision pour la livraison d’eau : le camion passe tous les matins dimanche compris à 8 h 00
Pour ceux qui ont besoin de gaz le shipchandler sur le quai n’en a pas mais vous en trouverez chez Trade Center Koronitis (voir photo) à l’autre extrémité de la baie. Les courageux iront à pied les autres (sans doute les plus nombreux) prendront un taxi.

reviews.author: Mario,Alexandra,🐕Cacau s/v Mr. Blue🇵🇹
reviews.body:
Nice place, no electricity, water on a truck, the lady control the payment very hard.
No water, no electricity, no nothing, just the kay, it shoud be cheaper or free.

reviews.author: 🇦🇺 Tim
reviews.body:
From a tourist perspective there’s not that much appealing about Porto Heli, the restaurants are fine, the shops are ok. Diesel and water via tanker. If there’s no need to come here, why bother. But if you need a sheltered harbor to wait out storms then it’s hard to beat - it’s a fantastic harbor for safe mooring. So 5 stars for safe harbor, 3 for environment, that’s 4 overall.

Note on water and diesel:

Both are available here. For diesel, Revoil will send a truck to the pier. He seems to also do a few drive by’s during the day. More during summer period. If he’s not there, just go ask at Revoil station (up on the road near the AB supermarket) and they’ll give you a time. 

For Water: Tanker does a run starting at 9AM every day during the season (May - September) and only on Mon - Fri on the shoulder season (Oct / Apr). Not sure what happens in depth of winter!

Note on payment: Port authority explained to me that they charge for a stay of more than 6 hours in a day, so “I arrived at 4pm and left at 10am the next day” counts as 2 days stay, not 1 overnight. Bit rude, but now you know! Lately the port authority seem to be coming by at 9AM, so if you leave before then, well it’s going to be tough for them to charge you 🤣

reviews.author: Edwin
reviews.body:
Ne acqua ne elettricità disponibile in banchina. Trattorie e supermercati si.
Pagato per una notte 17,00 € più caro di Navplion! Super affollato di charter di tutte le nazionalità ! Un posto da fermarsi solo se hai qualche necessità, altrimente ci sono delle belle rade nei dintorni !

reviews.author: Andy
reviews.body: Friendly staff, good services and a short hop to town for supplies.

reviews.author: Martin
reviews.body:
Eine Marina wo das Preis-Leistungsverhältnis passt. 
Hilfsbereite Marineros.
Ich machte einen Stopp für mehrere Tage da ein Crewwechsel anstand und außerdem eine Reparatur am Saildrive notwendig war. 
Bei der Reparatur wurde sofort geholfen doch da war der Preis über dem Niveau. 
LG Martin

reviews.author: Laurent et Véro
reviews.body: Grande marina, Personnel sympa et serviable, 2 personnes à l’amarrage . Propre , agréable . Super magasin d’accastillage , Nautilus ,  tres sympa, compétent et bien achalandé . Seuls bémols pour moi : supermarché et restaurants sont loins, 35 min de marche ou taxi ( pas cher c’est vrai , 5€)  , et puis marina assez chère : presque 200 € la nuit , avec le mètre cube d’eau a 5€. Mais globalement bonne escale  !

reviews.author: Annie & Grant
reviews.body: Lovely Marina. Professional and warm welcome from marineros and office staff. Unfortunately as previously stated, do not go on a weekend as they cannot accommodate other vessels on a Friday night. They tried very hard but were unable to help us to stay longer. We had the hull scraped by divers which was very expensive but they did a good job. Marius in the technical department was extremely helpful and professional. All in all, a happy albeit short stay. The small grocery store is not brilliantly stocked with fresh produce but ok for basics. Not as friendly as the rest of the marina except for the one man “Greece” who was amazing and even helped me bring the supplies to the boat.

reviews.author: Stephen & Linda
reviews.body: there is an excellent restaurant, well found marine store and laundry. try and schedule your arrival and departure outside of the weekend when charter boats are changing out. rental cars on site to access anywhere. we spent 4 days on maintenance and a road trip, very rewarding

reviews.author: Hermann
reviews.body:
Der Hafen ist sicher. In die Innenstadt kommt man mit der Bahn direkt nach monastiraki.  Haltestelle beim Stadion ca. 10 min. Zu Fuß. Um eur 1,20 kommt man damit in die Altstadt von wo aus alle Besichtigungen um die Akropolis fußläufig möglich sind. Die Marina ist dennoch nicht zu empfehlen. Grund: extrem laute freiluftdiskothek direkt neben dem Hafen. Musik bis 06.30 am Morgen. An Schlaf ist deshalb nicht zu denken. Sanitäranlagen sehr schlecht.
Hermann

reviews.author: Ann
reviews.body: This marina is secure, safe, quiet because no shops cafes and  restaurants. The staff on the dock can not be more helpful  . Caring and kind.  Assistance is fast and professional. The electricity and water is assisted. Safe for yr boat. Well worth a stay. U need a scooter and it's perfect..

reviews.author: André
reviews.body:
Port très bien situé pour une excursion touristique vers le centre de la ville (transports en commun très proches).
Très bien organisé et équipé (il y a même une piste pour hélicoptère....)
Mais la proximité de l'autoroute  urbaine et l'éloignement (à pied) des commerces sont des handicaps.
NB c'est en théorie une marina pour mega-yacht, mais parfois une petite place peut être trouvée pour un petit voilier....

reviews.author: familiaporelmundo
reviews.body: They have a few (10) guest places. So if you d like a place make sure to write an email in advance. Staff is very helpful, so just ask. No shops or anything around. Walking to the supermarket takes like 20 minutes. Anything for the boat like gaz or parts they deliver, just ask the staff. Delivery of a Gas bottle 10€ to your boat. We paid in september 65€/15 meters. Showers with hot water on the east side of the marina.

reviews.author: Michel
reviews.body:
Excellente protection totale. Nous nous sommes abrités la par un fort coup de meltem (40 nds). Très bon accueil du personnel. 
Une seule critique à faire : l’environnement qui n’est pas franchement glamour : échangeur d’autoroute (mais très raisonnablement bruyant), le stade olympique, le manque de commerces à proximité.
Par contre l’accès à Athènes ou au Pirée est très facile : arrêt métro Nea Faliro à 5 mn à pied. 
Pour le reste tout est parfait.

reviews.author: Yallah
reviews.body: Anse Nord de Andros, the north wind quickly raises small unpleasant waves, preferably anchor north of the bay after the western dike of the port and facing the big white house. Beware funds that go up quickly. Very beautiful chora where you have to get lost.

reviews.author: ERIC Neel 45
reviews.body: Good anchorage of sand we can dock with the annex on the south side. Beautiful city to visit.

reviews.author: ERIC Neel 45
reviews.body: Good anchorage of sand we can dock with the annex on the south side. Beautiful city to visit.

reviews.author: frederic
reviews.body:
Nous arrivés vers 17h. 
Nous étions 2 bateaux cul au quai. Nuit calme et très bonne accroche de l’ancre.  Le village est charmant. Des tavernes à profusion   
Endroit très beau malgré l’austérité du relief.

reviews.author: Lucilla & Andrea
reviews.body:
Siamo arrivati a Panormos con 17 nodi da NNE ed in queste condizioni l'ormeggio garantisce un buon riparo dal mare, meno dal vento.
Ci siamo ormeggiati lateralmente in testa al molo, accettando una risacca piuttosto fastidiosa ma non pericolosa.
In testa al molo vi è spazio per 2 imbarcazioni, un'altra può mettersi sul lato W. A fine settembre le due colonnine di luce/acqua erano disattivate (ma volendo c'è una fontanella lungo la strada a pochi metri da lì), nessuno è venuto a chiedere denaro.
Molti bei ristoranti, anche se a mio parere con prezzi superiori alla norma. Un solo minimarket. Nessuna possibilità di noleggiare scooter o auto.
Location splendida.

reviews.author: Ben
reviews.body:
Wonderfully sheltered anchorage, plenty of room (beware the charted shallow rocks in the NE corner - marked with an unlit stone pillar.

There is a wonderful hike (about 3K) through Pyrgos, an ideal half-way lunch stop.   Round a corner and the rocks morph suddenly into a brilliant white village with a square of restaurants.  The trail head is accessed via the road up the side of the very small Panormos mini market, and regularly marked with white/red flashes.

We anchored in 17m on the second attempt (perhaps not the best holding for more than 20kts; there is plenty of room to anchor in shallower waters, but we arrived at dusk and prefer to maintain a generous swing radius

reviews.author: Andreas
reviews.body:
Ein schöner Ankerplatz und ein schöner kleiner Ort. Hat uns sehr gut gefallen. Auch die Wanderung nach Pygros war schön. Pyrgos sollte man nicht auslassen! 
Der Ankergrund hält sehr gut im Sand.  Man muss aber auf die kleinen Bojen, die alten Anker und Ketten achten! Siehe Foto.

reviews.author: Corinne
reviews.body: Une nuit passée au quai parfaite. C'est calme, tout en étant proche des tavernes. Typiquement grec très loin de Mykonos pourtant si proche... Pour notre plus grand bonheur. Aucun problème avec notre tirant d'eau de 1.90m en longside. Nous serions bien restés plus longtemps. Pas d'eau ni électricité mi juin.

reviews.author: Michel
reviews.body: Mouillage par 8 m sur du sable  d'accord avec les commentaires précédents le fond remonte très vite... numéro du taxi pour le théâtre 6974714369   ..40 euro AR pour 4

reviews.author: Francis
reviews.body:
Très bon mouillage pour aller visiter l’amphithéâtre, nous avons pris Georges le taxi sérieux et ponctuel.
Attention de la bouée rouge la plus au large il y a une grosse chaîne qui va vers la pointe.
Nous étions mouillés dans 4 mètres d’eau sur du sable

reviews.author: SV Aero - Hollie & Hubert
reviews.body:
Beautiful little spot to spend an afternoon or, as we did, a few days. Anchored in 4 meters of sand directly in front of the Mouria Hotel and Restaurant (good food). It gets shallow quite fast so take caution when approaching the shoreline. 

The sunken city starts about 500-700 meters to the south along the beach. We took our paddleboards over to go snorkeling. It’s quite interesting. There were several boats that anchored in the bay further to the south side of the sunken city, but non of them stayed the night. 

The peninsula on the north side is a good hike. You pass the ancient amphitheater on the way and get a good view of the anchorage as well as the main bay to the north. There is also a little church to visit that overlooks the anchorage.

reviews.author: Michael
reviews.body: Guter Platz um die versunkene römische Villa zu besuchen. Die navionics tiefen stimmen nicht. Wir ankerten in Kiesel/Stein. Bei starkem Wind möchte ich hier nicht sein. Derzeit im Mai viele Quallen.

reviews.author: Jérôme
reviews.body:
Magnifique mouillage, très calme. Attention le fond remonte vite. Fond de sable, très bonne tenue. 
Le restaurant Mouria est absolument magnifique et très bon. Un endroit magique à ne pas manquer. 
La cité engloutie n’est pas très loin. Site très peu profond à faire en snorkeling.

reviews.author: Styria
reviews.body: I was not allowed to anchor behind the swimming buoys because the space for the jet skis was needed

reviews.author: Jean-Luc
reviews.body: Nice place to anchor. Too bad techno music ruins everything ... even in October.

reviews.author: Jean-Luc
reviews.body: Nice place to anchor. Too bad techno music ruins everything ... even in October.

reviews.author: frederic
reviews.body:
Magnifique mouillage. Bien abrité du meltem. Un peu rouleur mais sans plus 
Fond de sable de très bonne tenue. 
Très bonnes tavernes en particulier Oméga 3 !

reviews.author: Ahmet
reviews.body: very good protected sandy bottom bay to anchor for swimming in clean water on 5/6 m depth-40-50m chain max. on your way going to Mylos island. To avoid very rare visible flat natural stone at the same level of bottom care need.You have to be sure that the penetration of your anchor is guaranteed  by dig in it at 1500 RPM reverse speed. For detailed info check the foto of the map. Garbage green tanks available only in marina side. Debts are not suitable and homogeneous inside the marina for sailing boats.places inside very limited. Better not to take any risk once you have sandy bottom in this bay for safety anchoring. Stay outside of yellow buoys; inside swimming area is not permitted to use your dingy, controlled by red short  guards.

reviews.author: Chris
reviews.body: Good holding on sand. Anyway, on Meltemi the wind accelerates on this island and it's a bit stronger here than in other bays. Also, swell comes around

reviews.author: Edwin
reviews.body: Ampia baia con un fondo di sabbia ottima tenitore, con una spiaggia tranquilla ! C’è posto per tante barche ben distanziate tra di loro senza problemi. Quando cala il vento ci viene un leggero rollio, ma sopportabile .Attenzione alla catena segnalata su Navionics!

reviews.author: Willy Sailingkunik
reviews.body:
Fondeo muy agradable sin complicaciones fondo de arena con muy buen agarre cerca de la boyas delimitan zona bañistas.en 4-5 MTS buena protección. El dinghy hay que dejarlo en el puerto ya,que no se puede ir a la playa, el socorrista te lo impide, en verano por supuesto. El pueblo solo tiene bares y restaurantes llenos de turistas y locales. Mucho hotelito y zona muy turística. 
#sailingkunik

reviews.author: Rainer
reviews.body: Netter Ort, in der Einfahrt liegt ein großer Anker! Beachten Sie die Eintragung in Navionics. Auch sonst ist der Hafen mit 3 Meter Wassertiefe seicht und es liegen Steine auf dem Grund, die man aber gut sehen kann. Der Kai auf der linken Seite vom Schwimmponton ist für uns Gäste, hier haben wir an der rechten Hälfte 2,8 - 3 Meter Tiefe und auf der linken Hälfte 2 Meter Tiefe direkt vor dem Kai. Jeweils von der Einfahrt aus gesehen. Im Ort gibt es 2 kleine Supermärkte, die Preise sind ok.

reviews.author: Jim
reviews.body: A nice little harbour but it is small and shallow. This is a quiet town for the most part. There is a bakery and small supermarket. A few good tavernas and bars… but no bustle. A really nice beach club with an excellent beach nearby. Protection is fair but a bit bumpy in S to SE.

reviews.author: Marcello
reviews.body:
Non è un porto protetto da tutti i quadranti: venti da E a SE formano onde che entrano rendendo la sosta problematica.
Tali venti si formano regolarmente nel pomeriggio dei giorni di bel tempo ed entrano mettendo in movimento tutte le barche all'ormeggio... Il fenomeno tuttavia dura poche ore e non raggiunge mai un livello pericoloso.
Buona protezione da venti, anche forti, da N (vedi foto).

reviews.author: Peter
reviews.body:
We loved it  the main pontoon was full but the quay is available to visitors from 1.30 pm to 11 am   We draw 2.1 m and were near the outer end   
Our younger crew enjoyed the swimming pools just above the quay which are available to those who buy drinks there 
Reasonable protection not tested in the calm conditions we had  
Good restaurant at foot of road up hill    We all liked this place

reviews.author: Sue
reviews.body:
Moored stern to on outer breakwater. Nobody to help. 
Only 4 outlets for electricity and water. We managed to get one. 

Harbour mistress showed at 7:30. Told she would be there at 6:00

Charged €10 for water useless it iiiî
